title: Create Blaze Burner Fuel Overrides
description: Allows you to override blaze burner fuels because for some reason you can't.
body:
Since create blaze burner fuels are not able to be overriden with data packs, I created this mod to do just that.
This mod is meant for pack developers and it only replaces some fuels for demonstration purposes.

[Datapack API](https://github.com/rekales/create-blaze-burner-fuel-overrides/wiki/Datapack-API)
